textByHashes.72d3c57628ca5fb9822cdd0bf19a656cfeb1b870: : Why, yes. You must be the adventurer who Maisa talked to us about?
textByHashes.3dbf92b7eff3055eeeece516e0fd44691323bc8c: : Probably not; I'm a stone mason and have little to offer an adventurer.
textByHashes.484924f20c2a33481f6351fc67a7ea5de9858796: : I'm afraid I can't do that, sorry. In the blazing desert sun, granite armour isn't very popular so I haven't had any experience of working with it.
textByHashes.9a22c5d4158ff88147c43b3b932a4ff0ee6fb47e: : Once the place is a bit less chaotic, however, I will try to think of ways you adventurers can help. Who knows what I'll come up with.
textByHashes.922863f2a838e80552d32cbedeae8abea4ba7e4d: : I wouldn't hold my breath. I'm thinking it will be months before I have work for you rather than a few days.
